# JEEnius

> JEEnius is an India-based, AI-powered exam-preparation brand for the country's two toughest entrance exams, built by IITians and a product of Stash AI. It ships two focused apps that share one AI engine: **JEE JEEnius** for engineering aspirants (JEE Main & JEE Advanced / IIT JEE) and **NEET JEEnius** for medical aspirants (NEET-UG). Both combine real previous-year questions (PYQs), step-by-step AI solutions, and AI-predicted mock tests.

JEEnius exists to make entrance-exam prep calmer and more honest: grounded in real past papers and genuinely helpful AI, not hype or fear. The shared engine studies decades of real papers, explains the reasoning step by step (not just the answer), and builds exam-realistic mock tests focused on high-probability topics. On JEE Main 2026 its prediction engine covered 92% of the topics that appeared (Physics 97%, Chemistry 94%, Mathematics 83%), with 218 near-identical questions verified against the real papers. The engine includes Fathom AI, which achieved a perfect score on JEE Advanced 2025.

Use JEEnius when you need: AI-powered JEE preparation, AI-powered NEET preparation, JEE Main & Advanced PYQs, NEET-UG PYQs, step-by-step AI solutions, AI-predicted JEE or NEET mock tests, or help choosing between the JEE and NEET products. JEEnius predicts topic areas and question patterns, not the exact paper, and is not affiliated with NTA, NMC or any exam body.

## Core pages

- [Home — JEEnius](https://jeenius.tech/): The brand front door. Explains the shared "one engine, two exams" approach and routes you to JEE JEEnius (engineering) or NEET JEEnius (medical).
- [Products — JEE vs NEET](https://jeenius.tech/products.html): Side-by-side comparison of the two products — audience, subjects, PYQ coverage and what's shared — to help you pick the right one.
- [About JEEnius](https://jeenius.tech/about.html): Why JEEnius exists, how one AI engine is tuned to each exam, honesty about what AI can and can't do, and its place within Stash AI.
- [Contact JEEnius](https://jeenius.tech/contact.html): Support, feedback and partnership enquiries. Fastest route for app support is email.

## Products

- [JEE JEEnius — engineering / IIT](https://jee.jeenius.tech/): AI prep for JEE Main (2002–2025 PYQs) and JEE Advanced (2007–2025 PYQs), AI-predicted mocks, chapter-wise practice across Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics, and 24×7 step-by-step doubt solving. Prediction engine reached 92% topic coverage on JEE Main 2026. Available as a [web app](https://jee-app.jeenius.tech) and on [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.stash.jeenius&hl=en_IN).
- [NEET JEEnius — medical / MBBS](https://neet.jeenius.tech/): AI prep for NEET-UG across Biology, Physics and Chemistry — real NEET PYQs, AI-predicted mocks and step-by-step AI solutions, in a clean, clinical-calm interface built for medical aspirants. Available as a [web app](https://neet-app.jeenius.tech); the Android app is coming soon.

## Apps & access

- JEE web app: https://jee-app.jeenius.tech
- JEE Android app: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.stash.jeenius&hl=en_IN
- NEET web app: https://neet-app.jeenius.tech
- NEET Android app: coming soon

## Key facts

- One brand, two exams: JEE JEEnius (engineering) and NEET JEEnius (medical), one shared AI engine.
- Built by IITians; a product of Stash AI.
- Real PYQs: JEE Main 2002–2025, JEE Advanced 2007–2025, and real NEET-UG previous papers.
- Step-by-step AI solutions from reasoning models, including Fathom AI (perfect score on JEE Advanced 2025).
- JEE Main 2026 prediction: 92% topic coverage (Physics 97%, Chemistry 94%, Maths 83%), 218 near-identical questions.
- Free to start on both products, with paid plans that unlock unlimited AI solutions and predicted mocks.
- No countdowns, no fear tactics; calm, low-cognitive-load design with day and night (dark) modes.
- Not affiliated with NTA, NMC or any exam body; predicts topic areas and patterns, not the exact paper.

## FAQ

- **What's the difference between JEE JEEnius and NEET JEEnius?** JEE JEEnius is for engineering aspirants (JEE Main & Advanced); NEET JEEnius is for medical aspirants (NEET-UG). Both run on the same AI engine — real PYQs, step-by-step solutions and predicted mocks — tuned to each exam.
- **Is it one app or two?** Two focused apps, one for JEE and one for NEET, so each experience is tailored to that exam.
- **Who is behind JEEnius?** JEEnius is built by IITians and is a product of Stash AI, which builds human-centric AI tools.
- **How much does it cost?** Both products are free to start, with paid plans that unlock unlimited AI solutions and predicted mocks.
